Semantic web search. Returns relevant web pages for a natural language query. Max 10 results per request via x402.
REQUIRED FIRST STEP: Get authentication credentials (id_token, refresh_token, user_id) before calling any other Laso endpoint. The id_token is a Bearer token valid for ~1 hour.
